mcp.description:
Provider supports MCP server bridging (i.e. accepts the
`mcp_servers` field of [`AgentRunRequest`]).

resume.description: Provider supports `agent/resume` against prior session ids.

streaming.description: Provider emits `agent/output` deltas as the model produces them.

write_capable.description:
Provider can edit files in the working directory (vs. read-only
research providers).
